name: Nextel Medical Corp.
summary: PART I . Corporate History We were incorporated in the State of Nevada on April 28, 2010 under the name Norman Cay Development, Inc. From inception until September 1, 2011, we were an Exploration Stage company that had not commenced any operations. It was our initial intention to be an authorized retailer of wireless telephones and service plans with our initial operation in Michigan or elsewhere in the Midwest.
